title: Buttery Paleo Couscous
description: A creamy and buttery paleo-friendly dish that serves as a quick-fix Russian-style breakfast or side dish.

ingredients.name: Paleo Couscous
ingredients.notes: Use gluten-free couscous available at most health food stores or online.

ingredients.name: Ghee (Clarified Butter)
ingredients.notes: For paleo, use coconut or avocado oil as an alternative if ghee is not available.

ingredients.name: Fresh Herbs (optional)
ingredients.notes: Such as dill or parsley, fresh for extra flavor.

instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring the coconut milk to a simmer over medium heat.
Add the ghee and mix well until fully incorporated into the milk.
Stir in the salt and pepper. If using fresh herbs, add them now for freshness.
Reduce heat to low and cook the mixture for about 10 minutes until slightly thickened.
Meanwhile, prepare the Paleo Couscous according to package instructions (usually steaming or boiling), ensuring it's cooked through and drained of excess liquid.
Gently fold in the cooked couscous into the coconut milk mixture.
Serve hot as a side dish or over protein for an elevated paleo breakfast.
